description: The 'Ndrina Pelle, also known as Pelle-Vottari, is a 'ndrina (mafia clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in San Luca, Calabria, Italy. It is one of the most influential 'ndrine, with members serving in advisory and top bodies of the organization, particularly in the Ionian mandate and the province. The clan is active in international cocaine trafficking, contract rigging, extortion, and has been documented influencing regional election campaigns.

country_links.context: The organization sold cocaine in Austria.

country_links.evidence_quote: approdava ai porti di ... Anversa e rivenduta in ... Belgio
country_links.context: The organization routed cocaine through the port of Antwerp and sold it in Belgium.

country_links.evidence_quote: traffico internazionale di stupefacenti tra ... Brasile
country_links.context: The organization was involved in international drug trafficking that included Brazil.

country_links.evidence_quote: ha contatti con i cartelli colombiani
country_links.context: The organization has contacts with Colombian cartels for international cocaine trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: La cocaina veniva importata da Ecuador
country_links.context: The organization imported cocaine from Ecuador.

country_links.evidence_quote: vengono uccise sei persone a Duisburg
country_links.context: The organization carried out a massacre in Duisburg, killing six people.

country_links.evidence_quote: portata in Ghana, dove truffando la FAO avevano accesso ai suoi fondi ... e la si stoccava, infine veniva spedita in Italia
country_links.context: The organization used Ghana as a storage and transit point for cocaine shipped to Italy.

country_links.evidence_quote: approdava ai porti di Amburgo e Anversa e rivenduta in ... Paesi Bassi
country_links.context: The organization routed cocaine through the port of Amsterdam and sold it in the Netherlands.
A member of the organization was arrested in Lisbon, indicating presence.
The organization had connections with Turkish criminals in drug trafficking.
